name: Chocolaty Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Soy milk (or rice or almond milk)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly oil a 9-inch square baking pan.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, 1/2 cup of sugar, 1/4 cup of cocoa,
and the baking powder.
Stir in the soy milk and add the walnuts.
Spread the cake mixture into the baking pan and sprinkle with the remaining
1/2 cup of sugar and 1/4 cup of cocoa.
Pour the hot water over the entire cake batter.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the cake is set and the chocolate sauce is bubbly.
